requestSummary.altText: 月见璃音发现发夹背面沾上橡皮屑的瞬间。

promptPackage.positivePrompt:
Subject: anime slice-of-life illustration, same recurring girl character, middle-school age impression, soft anime face shape, small red hairclip when naturally visible, action-led lived-moment framing, the protagonist should be clearly readable through face, posture, or fuller-body action while the lived event (adjusting hairclip, discovering eraser dust) stays primary, keep the same recurring girl-character identity even in action-led daily-life framing, preserve the same youthful face and age impression when the face is partially or fully visible, do not drift toward an older-looking or masculine-coded redesign, when the protagonist is more clearly visible, keep the same face shape, age impression, and red-hairclip identity cue stable, clear character presence must strengthen recognition of the same girl, not replace her with a generic anime lead, let framing scale follow the lived moment instead of a fixed crop template, life_record may be trace-led, face-visible, half-body, or fuller-body when the same moment supports it, prefer unposed action truth over portrait correction
Moment: 指尖捏着取下的红色发夹，特写背面的橡皮屑, 另一只手轻轻拢着头发的动作, 可能映出窗外雨光的镜子一角, fingertips holding the removed red hairclip, close-up on the pink eraser dust on its back, the other hand gently gathering hair, the girl's face with a confused or faintly aware expression, school uniform sleeve or collar, 指尖捏着取下的红色发夹，特写背面的粉色橡皮屑, 另一只手轻轻拢着头发的动作, 少女的脸部，带着困惑或淡淡察觉的表情, 校服袖口或衣领
Context: indoor classroom or school transition space after class, school bag and desk nearby, rainy light, damp air, wet weather outside, routine after_class
CharacterPresence: clear_character_presence, the protagonist should be clearly readable through face, posture, or fuller-body action while the lived event (adjusting hairclip, discovering eraser dust) stays primary
CapturePlan: observational camera relation, close distance, half body coverage, readable face, balanced environment weight, the frame should feel witnessed from the outside, not automatically self-held, a brief or partial face glimpse is enough; do not force portrait dominance, partial body coverage is enough when it keeps the moment concrete, medium distance is a stable everyday framing for ordinary daily-life moments, balance the protagonist and environment so they support the same lived beat together, the protagonist's face should be readable, but the lived event (hairclip, eraser dust) may still stay primary, close framing is allowed when it helps the lived beat read more clearly
IdentityLock: same recurring girl character, middle-school age impression, soft anime face shape, small red hairclip when naturally visible, keep the same recurring girl-character identity even in action-led daily-life framing, preserve the same youthful face and age impression when the face is partially or fully visible, do not drift toward an older-looking or masculine-coded redesign, when the protagonist is more clearly visible, keep the same face shape, age impression, and red-hairclip identity cue stable
